# Minecraft Clone Master Plan

GOAL: Produce a full technical plan and documentation structure for a Minecraft Beta 1.7.3-level clone aligned with project constraints.
TIMELINE: current session

## Task Checklist

### Phase 1: Inputs and constraints
- [*] Review available project context and constraints
- [ ] Validate doc placement and output structure

### Phase 2: Technical plan
- [ ] Define recommended engine architecture on C#/.NET 10/DX12 via Vortice
- [ ] Define phased roadmap
- [ ] Define chunk, meshing, and frametime-first pipeline decisions

### Phase 3: Documentation structure
- [ ] Define doc file list and short contents
- [ ] Finalize concise deliverable

## Notes
- Windows-only, Win10+
- Singleplayer first, co-op later
- Beta 1.7.3 spirit and mechanics
- Modern UX 2026
- RU/EN support
- Stable frametime prioritized over peak FPS
- Existing assets available in /assets

## Success Criteria
- [ ] Architecture is implementation-ready
- [ ] Roadmap is phased and practical
- [ ] Chunk/meshing choices are concrete
- [ ] Documentation tree is complete enough to start writing
